entry.title: Deactivation of Classic Profit center accounting
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have migrated to New GL in FY-2024.Following April to March Calendar year.

Both classic PCA and New Profit center accounting is active in the system.

The ask is to deactivate classic PCA and GLT0.

Can anyone throw some light or provide insights in the below query:

1.What will be the impact of deactivating the classic PCA and GLT0?

2.What steps do we need to follow to avoid any disruption?

Any help will be highly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Connection Rejected Error in CAP
entry.content:
@ArkadeepNandi 

What happens if you change the request URL to {{baseUrl}}/hello?

entry.title: Re: Analytics Cloud Connetion to S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
It seems like, we had to wait some time for the setttings to take effect.

2hrs later we tried again and everything worked fine.

entry.title: Mails regarding failed Taskchains in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I've noticed that we been receiving mails when a task chain is completed. Although when we take a look at the setting that is selected: 

'Send email notification only when the run has completed with an error'. 

Yet we are still receiving emails, once in a while, when status: completed. Rather than only on failure

Seems like a bug.

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content: Hi J. Sounds strange - do you now get also different adjusted transport fulfillments? Probably best to open an according support case, so that all the details can be seen.

entry.title: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content:
Hi This has been a problem for a very long time. Since I started using Fedora which is 4 years ago.

I use Eclipse for SAP BW on HANA. Mainly use it to maintain HANA based objects. However, I did find weird issues. Example below.

We maintain composite providers and map to out. When I do this on windows eclipse I see the mapping as below. This is how it suppose to be.

 
 

However on Fedora (Linux) version I dont.

Any ideas to resolve this problem?

Eclipse and Java version

Note: I have tried using all sorts of Java versions, include SAPMachine which is based on Open Java

entry.title: Maintenace plan Automatic Skip FM
entry.content:
Hi Community,

My customer was using standard task list due to this some of maintenance plans calls have no operation so due to this issue when we run RISTRA20 program plan was not scheduled due to No operation error, to avoid this issue we have developed Automatic skip program by using This FM MPLAN_SKIP_CALL. How this program will work is will Schedule Two step job first we will run RISTRA20 2nd step is Automatic Skip program will run once we got error in Ristra 20 step that particular call this automatic program will skip it was skipping successfully,

But the problem when we run this Automatic skip program, Next planned counter reading is not taken as counter confirmation reading, even though we have activated check box for completion requirement. But it is working fine while doing Manul skip in IP10. But when we use This automatic program skipping counter calculation is wrong.

Can you please suggest if you ever encounter this issue and how did you resolve 

Please find below snapshot for better understanding

Best Regards 

Subba Rayudu

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One field mapping with FSM Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Supriya,

only specific default fields from SAP B1 are synchronized to FSM cloud.
If there are fields you'd like to have at FSM, you have to add an influence entry or create an UDF.

UDFs are always synchronized to FSM Cloud.

Best regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace - gain an overview on your system landscape health
entry.content:
Hi @SusanneGlaenzer ,

Good Day to you,

Kindly guide regarding the EWA reports availability in the ME Portal (me.sap.com/apps/ewaworkspace) is functional without the presence of SAP Solution Manager.

In one of the landscapes, i see S4HANA systems are hosted in RISE with SAP environment, for generating the readiness check for cloud-alm, we had used the on-prem SolMan. however, this on-prem SolMan is about to get de-commissioned, by doing so will we loose the EWA report which is currently available in the URL -  me.sap.com/apps/ewaworkspace

Kindly try to share the SAP Note or Blog on above topic, if any.

 

Thanks for the informative above blog.

Hemant Vaswani

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite: Automating Email Alerts for Failed Interfaces in SAP CPI
entry.content: Great approach. Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Java Cap remote debugging not working with Java 17
entry.content:
Hi,
Maybe it is an issue with the commandline-configuration you are using - I use VsCode integrated terminal too and the connection closes, when I Crtl-C or close the terminal instance.
If your issue is security you could turn off ssh of your application and then restart it.


Pascal.

entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide
entry.content: Great insights Nagesh. When it comes to licensing metric, does record refers practically to plain text document in 1:1 ratio (1 record = 1 document)?

entry.title: Re: switching source systems from DEV to QA for BW dev
entry.content:
because of the huge differences between these source-systems and possible overlapping number-ranges I strongly recommend deleting all the BW-objects and reload from scratch.
Depending on the technical- or business-connections between your BW-objects you have to delete and reload individual parts step by step for these two years.

entry.title: Tutorial: Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello community,
I am currently working on the tutorial ‘Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad’. In step two it says for SAP AI Launchpad "Go to ML Operations -> Scenarios. Check whether the foundation-models scenario is present in your AI-Core workspace." The foundation models are not available for me. What could be the reason? I would be very grateful if you could suggest a solution. 

I am on a trial account and have already completed the first steps. 

Thank you very much!

Ulzhan

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but t...
entry.content: check the number-format of your 0CALMONTH-filter !

entry.title: Re: Use of Program rfopenposting_fr in New GL for FEC filing
entry.content: Balance was uploaded in new GL by the client in 2024. This balance is of 2021/2022/2023 Fiscal years. furthermore, I executed FAGL_FR_03 for year 2021 and the field BKPF-BSTAT was correctly updated to O. Next, FTW1A and FTWH has been done correctly. Now, when I again execute the program FAGL_FR_03 for year 2022, I cannot see the field BKPF-BSTAT updated. Is there any issue?

entry.title: Item XXXX: Subitem 100 is not in maximum selection S-BC-TT-11
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I got the following error message invalidation universal journal via Data Monitor app in sap group reporting 2022, How to solve it?  Thanks.

Item 102224: Subitem 100 is not in maximum selection S-BC-TT-11

Diagnosis

The current data record contains characteristic value 100 for characteristic Subitem. The item 102224 is assigned to the maximum selection S-BC-TT-11 for this characteristic. However, the value 100 is not included in this; for this reason, it cannot be used for the current item.

System Response

The current data record cannot be processed.

Procedure

Reclassify the data record manually using manual posting with the special document type of posting level 0C (Adjustment Entry for Universal Document).

Make sure that on the item 102224, the characteristic values of the drilldown characteristic Subitem should be limited to the maximum selection S-BC-TT-11.

Message No. FINCS_ACCTG_INTEG100

entry.title: Re: how to create time-based Condition Monitoring Plan
entry.content: you have to maintain measurement point at PRT level of the operation of the task list assigned to the the maintenance item of the plan.

entry.title: Special GL indicators missing when using Fiori F0773
entry.content:
Hi,

When using Fiori F0773 and selecting Special GL indicators for documents to clear, the system shows an incomplete list of available Special GL. However, when using sapgui F-32, F-28, the system shows the complete list of all Special GL created for customers. I found OSS note 3378205 and 2017117, but they do not seem to do anything.

I cannot find any peculiarity between the specific GL indicators showing up, and the ones that don't. Because of this situation, we have a number of users having to jump from Fiori to sapgui and back. Is there any configuration needed? or programm correction? Note 2017117 explains that the Model Cache needs to be clean up. But again, it does not seem to have any effect.

Thanks and best regards,

entry.title: Re: Become a Paid Expert for Ask an Expert Peer program! NEW BTP Products available!
entry.content:
Hi @atulmehrotra ,
I reached out to Movate and they said that they are contacting you.

In general:

Not all products areas show distinctly in the expert's tags - experts should look for their network integration tags (SAP, SAP Resolve, or SAP Help Center). If experts are unsure about what product areas they are tagged for, they should write in to the "Ask a Peer" widget (on the Movate website).

entry.title: Re: SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace - gain an overview on your system landscape health
entry.content:
Hi @HemantVaswani ,

good day to you, too!

The Solution Manager is not required for the EWA report in SAP for Me (https://me.sap.com/ewa/workspace). The data can be sent by the systems directly via the transaction SDCCN. 

SAP Note 207223 contains the configuration steps for sending ABAP EWA data to SAP, and generate the EWA report on SAP EWA Viewer.

Basically, the steps are:

  1. execute report RTCCTOOL in transactions SE38/SA38 and prepare the system.
  2. activate SDCCN as SAP Note 763561.
  3. schedule task 'Maintenance task' in SDCCN.
  4. create the EWA task via: SDCCN -> Task -> Create -> Request session data -> Periodic -> Earlywatch Alert -> Continue

For more detailed info, please see SAP Note 207223 - SAP EarlyWatch Alert Processed at SAP.

 

Best regards,

Susanne

entry.title: Maintain PIRs fiori app/Upload of materials with 'N/A' version along with 'Yes' Version fails
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I am posting the present as I am trying to upload PIRs with the 'Maintain PIRs' fiori app simultaneously for materials with preexisting plan (and version active) along with several new materials which have never been planned in the past (this is indicated by N/A in the selection screen and by version inactive in the mass maintenance screen). The system fails to upload the PIRs from the point at which it encounters the first N/A material onwards but only for the 'Yes' materials. It manages to maintain the PIRs for the rest of the N/A materials. 

I was wondering if there was any direct solution or a proper way to maintain the excel file in order to successfully upload PIRs for all the materials of interest at the same time. Or at least is there a way to massively change the version to active (without uploading 2 separate files) before I upload my file?

I also attach a screenshot of the error I receive in case it helps.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
Hello @matthiasstegmue , Time-Slice Feature Video is not opening as it is redirecting to Microsoft website and not taking any of my credentials.  Kindly suggest that if any alternative link for this.

Getting Error below: 

AADSTS90072: User account 'myaccount@mydomain.com' from identity provider 'https://sts.windows.net/262ee1aa-2e1f-r13f-ddf9-08c58809d9de/' does not exist in tenant 'SAP SE' and cannot access the application 'https://accounts.sap.com'(SAP SE: SAPID UnifiedAuthentication PROD) in that tenant. The account needs to be added as an external user in the tenant first. Sign out and sign in again with a different Azure Active Directory user account

entry.title: Evaluate High privilege profile assignments in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Dear


I request your support since we need to validate if it is possible through a report to obtain the following users:


User who assigned the SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW profiles


User assigned the profiles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW


It is possible to obtain a daily report and send it to the corresponding audit emails.


Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Evaluate High privilege profile assignments in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi,

you can use the SUIM report RSUSR100N to find such assignments. The result provides both information... who assigned it and to whom they have been assigned.

 

Selection happens on the roles and profiles tab - enter the required profile names there.

Create a variant for your selection and schedule the report daily. Then send the log to the required recipients.

 

b.rgds, Bernhard

entry.title: Re: Supply Protection of advanced ATP in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @Kaz_Iwamoto Thanks for writing such a great informative blog.

I have few questions, may be @Kaz_Iwamoto or @Arno-Meyer can clarify my doubts.

1. In above example, I found that protected quantity mentioned customer group. Under one customer group there will be several customers. Is this protected quantity for individual customer or for whole customer group?

2. Can I use ABC and SUP together for same plant? if yes then which one will be used first? I guess SUP 1st then ABC. can you please mention configuration path?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch / SAP Community Meetup Dortmund 20.03.2025
entry.content:
Der nächste SAP Stammtisch Dortmund findet am 20. März 2025 ab 18:30 Uhr statt.

Eingeladen ist jeder, der Lust und Zeit hat, unabhängig vom fachlichen Hintergrund, von Entwickler, Berater, Projekt Manager, Basis Administrator bis hin zum Endanwender. Im Mittelpunkt steht ein lockerer fachlicher Austausch rund um SAP-Themen über Unternehmensgrenzen hinweg.

Wir freuen uns über bekannte und neue Gesichter. Melde dich idealerweise bis zum 14.03. an, damit wir passend planen können. Aber auch eine spontane Teilnahme ist gern gesehen.

Wann? 20.03.2025, 18:30 Uhr
Wo? Pfefferkorns No. 1, Am Markt 6, 44137 Dortmund

Weitere Infos findest du auch auf unserer Webseite: SAP Stammtisch Dortmund

Bis dann!

---

Our next SAP Community Meetup Dortmund will take place on March 20th 2025, at 06:30 PM.

Everyone is invited, regardless of their professional background, from developers, consultants, project managers, basis administrators to end users. The focus is on a relaxed professional exchange about SAP topics across company boundaries.

We look forward to seeing familiar and new faces. Ideally, please RSVP by the 14th so that we can plan accordingly. However, spontaneous participation is also welcome.

When? March 20th 2025, 6:30 PM
Where? Pfefferkorns No. 1, Am Markt 6, 44137 Dortmund, 44137 Dortmund

You can find additional information on our website (German): SAP Stammtisch Dortmund

See you then!

entry.title: Re: Data loading from SAP ECC to Datasphere
entry.content:
Could you write a CDS View which contains a custom field that applies your date logic?

This could then be reused after the switch to S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: Disable SAP GUI Security Pop-up when upload UI5 App in SAP
entry.content:
Hello all,

turning the SAP GUI Security Module almost completely off (which is the proposal here) is not an appropriate solution. The SAP GUI Security Module has a very important objective: To protect the client PC from any sort of attack from an SAP system that may have been compromised. If you would like more information, check the SAP GUI security guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/ca5169c2f72448eeb608cd09564ccf90/10eb2d38522846e6a7f46601a0c4f927.html

The right solution is to define an appropriate security rule which allows the download into the folder you selected. Yes, such a rule may have to be refined by using wildcards.

Generally, it is of course our recommendation to download files from SAP GUI into the dedicated folders SAP GUI is managing for this very purpose: The SAP GUI temporary folder and the SAP GUI documents folder. Using both locations for downloads will not result in security popups.

Best regards,
Frank Krause
Product Owner SAP GUI for Windows

entry.title: Re: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?
entry.content: Could you review the CDS View list here ?

entry.title: SAP FSM+SAP S/4 Public cloud - integration equipment counter/measurement point +measurement document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are implementing S/4HANA public cloud for our customer, I have question regarding Service module. My customer will use equipment master data with counters or measurement points. The process for the confirmation will be done via SAP Field Service Management on mobile application by the technician. In the integration list between SAP S/4 public cloud & FSM, I didn't see any mention regarding these features. 

The customer requirement is : the technician, during his work, has to check the counter or measurement point of the service order's equipment. The technician has to register the value for each counter (the counter should be displayed in FSM) and then the data should be transfered from FSM to S/4 public cloud.

I know that the fonctionnality exists in the service order confirmation but because the customer use FSM, the technician will never navigate in S/4 public cloud for the service confirmation. 

Did I missed something ? wthat is the standard process proposed by SAP in this case ? or is it in the road map ?

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but t...
entry.content: I already did that. My SQL query in the HANA DB Explorer has exactly the same WHERE clause as in the SQL statement generated by the DTP

entry.title: Re: Supply Protection of advanced ATP in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @arindamsur,
thank you for your question.

Regarding the first question: If you have defined a Supply Protection Object or a Protection Group of a SUP-Object with a characteristic like "Customer Group", than this will be the matching characteristics.

Any customer belonging to this Customer Group will match the protection and will not be restricted by this. The protection is no individually for a single customer. This means, one customer could order a huge quantity consuming the complete protection. This would be possible. If you want to have this more specific you could use the "Ship-To-Number" instead or as additional characteristic. So you could define protection groups for single customers and use the #-Value for a group with all other customers of the specific Customer Group.

Question 2: Yes you can run SUP and ABC. The request checks, if a quantity is available or not. Here SUP is considered (regarding restriction, match and consumption). Now, ABC jumps in to get the missing quantities. As ABC replaces either the plant and/or the material the situation for this new item is different and will probably match and consume from a different SUP-Object. In other words, the alternative item will be checked again against SUP and will typically also consume protection from another SUP-Object.

Best Regards,

Arno

entry.title: Deliveries marked for archiving with report /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE still visible in EWM system
entry.content:
After marking an SAP Extended Warehouse Management delivery document (PDO, FDO, ODR, PDI, IDN, SPC, WMR, PMR) for archiving (Status "For Archiving" - DAC), using the report /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE or /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE_STD, the system still shows the document in Delivery Processing transaction codes (/SCWM/PRDI, /SCWM/PRDO...) or in the Warehouse Monitor (/SCWM/MON), even if using the data source as "Database".

If the delivery was closed using the "Close Unfinished Deliveries" Check Monitor (/SCWM/CHM_LOG) tool, or it has a minor status inconsistency, the Check Monitor tool "Delivery Status (Only Check) and/or "General Delivery Status" may show the message "Doc. cat. &1 and status type &2 are inconsistent for &4 items" (/SCWM/CCHECK601), indicating the system found an inconsistency.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Deliveries marked for archiving with report /SCDL/BO_...
entry.content:
Archiving is not completed by using the report /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE or /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE_STD. These are the Preprocessing (Step 1) reports, which flags the documents ready for archiving (status DAC).

The Archiving of EWM Delivery Documents consists of three or four steps (depending on the Document Flow version).

Step 1: Preprocessing >> Use the report /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE or /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE_STD to set status DAC.
Step 2: Writing (archiving) >> Write data to the Archiving system
Step 3: Deleting >> Deletes data from the EWM system database
Step 4: Postprocessing >> Delete legacy document flow for archived documents (not relevant for Advanced Document Flow)

After step 3, the documents will no longer available for processing in EWM (i.e. Check Monitor tools will not analyse consistency).

References:

  • KBA 3553821 - Post Processing for EWM archiving in S/4HANA systems and with Advanced Document Flow
  • SAP Note 1402220 - Recommended notes and best practices for EWM Delivery Archiving

entry.title: Re: SAPLogon.exe is missing in C:\programme(x86)\SAP\Fron...
entry.content:
Hello,

you should check how you called the installation or defined your installation package.
The SAP GUI installation tree contains these components (among others):
- SAP GUI for Windows 8.10
-- SAP GUI Suite
--- SAP GUI
--- SAP Logon Pad
--- SAP Logon
...

If you only select the component SAP Logon Pad in this case, you will only get the SAP Logon Pad and nothing else. 

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

the issue should be solved now.

entry.title: Re: Preconditions required for SAP note 3562336 - [CVE-20...
entry.content:
Hello,

only if BOTH prerequisites are met, an attacker that has access to your Windows user context could get hold of the password by checking the memory of the process.

Best regards,
Frank Krause
Product Owner SAP GUI for Windows

entry.title: Need Value for Help in Adapt filter for custom field in Custom Analytical Queries

I have created Custom field Supplier/Employee as Code list of cds view type I_SupplierVH for Create supplier invoice and enabled that field in I_JournalEntryItem cds view. I am getting value for help in Create supplier invoice App but if I create custom report through custom cds view. There in analytical queries I have added Supplier/Employee i have added in adapt filters but there value for help is not coming, even in fields also supplier code is coming but supplier name is not coming.

I need either value for help in adapt filters or in down fields there in filter i need both code and description of supplier.

Kindly, requesting you to check on this.

This is in adapt filters in Custom analytical Queries

 

This is filter in row in Cutom analytical queries

This is in create supplier invoice app


Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to Manage Multiple Delivery Points from a Single...
entry.content: Thank you for your help. I understand that I need to specify the delivery location in the customer order. But, let's consider an example where a customer orders 10 machines and wants me to deliver 5 machines to address1 and 5 machines to address2. How should I proceed in SAP? Do I need to create 2 lines in my customer order, one line per destination? Or is there a different way to handle this, as I don't always know how many delivery locations the customer will request when I'm entering the customer order?

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive Guide to Unit Testing in CAP
entry.content:
@xavisanse You can configure the coverage folders also in jest config, for e.g. 

collectCoverageFrom: ["**/srv/**/*.ts", "!**/node_modules/**", "!**/srv/resources/**"]

entry.title: Re: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?
entry.content: Hi, I have followed the "solution" proposed in this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW_BRIDGE/387b8e1527744ed9a3188107f23f86fe/52633ef492954a91a058826b6889219b.html?locale=en-US. Not sure 10%% is valid, we have not done any test so far. What do you think about it?

entry.title: Re: When uploading bank statements, error: Currency USD n...
entry.content:
Hi @Manohar-D,

the fuzzy search basically, just searches in both fields for that bank account number. So it consideres both, the "normal" bank account number but also the "alternative bank account number".

 

If you have maintained the same number twice in public cloud, it's simply a wrong configuration. Because in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, you should have the number only once in your entire system. The moment you use this as an alternative number for a different bank account, the system will not know what belongs to what.

 

Best practice is pretty simple: each number should be defined in a unique way.

 

Keep in mind in the OnPrem/Private Cloud world, there are some specific cases where this makes sense. But for Public Cloud, it's just a wrong setup which should be fixed.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Connecting to a Database server on the internet
entry.content:
I am using SAP BTP Trial account to test deploying an app through SAP BTP Cloud Foundry. I have built the docker container and pushed into the SAP BTP cluster using CF push. However, the app does not start saying that it cannot connect to the Database. The app needs to connect to a MongoDB database running on a server hosted elsewhere on the internet. That server is accessible from other places and even running the image locally, works.

I tried setting up Destinations, but cannot get it to work. Can anyone help? Is what I am trying possible? An app deployed on BTP Cloud Foundry, talking to a database hosted on the open internet?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?

entry.title: Constraint net cannot be deleted (PMEVC)
entry.content:
Constraint net cannot be deleted

Freitag, 31. Januar 2025

 

Usecase for deleting the constraint net:

 

First create a dependency net (aka constraint net aka CN)

 

App: PMEVC (GUI-App)

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Save

 

 

 Then create constraint into the new CN

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Then release constraint and CN and save

 

Later, the CN can be removed from profile:

 

 

 

 

Works fine, on a first glance:

 

 

 

 App: CT04 (GUI-App)

 

 

However, the cstic AVC_ROBO_TYPE is still existent in the where-used list:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Now trying to cleanup:

 

When double clicking the CN AVC_RBT_CN_TEST_001_A can be displayed:

 

App: CU03 (GUI-App)

 

 

Display mode works fine

 

However, when switching to change mode…..

 

 

 

 

Then the error occurs:

 

 

How can we delete no longer needed constraint nets to ensure housekeeping?

entry.title: Re: SAC & BW live with parallel queries: Unable to retrieve data from the data source
entry.content:
Hi!
It seems that we are currently facing the some issue/problem.
Could you already solve your described problem?
Best regards,
Bernhard Thüringer

entry.title: Business Partner(BP) Complete Configuration Guide in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
In this blog, we’ll dive deep into the essentials of Business Partner configuration in SAP S4 HANA.

A business partner can represent an individual, an organization, or a group. It is defined by a fundamental structure that includes “business partner categories”. In SAP S/4 HANA, the Business Partner serves as the central object and a unified entry point for managing master data related to business partners, customers, and suppliers (previously referred to as vendors). This streamlined approach simplifies data maintenance and enhances consistency across the system.

Step 1: Define Business Partner Grouping

In SAP S/4 HANA, Business Partner Grouping is a key concept used to categorize and organize business partners based on specific criteria, such as their role (customer, vendor, or partner) or business requirements.

For example, you can create groupings like "Domestic Customers," "International Vendors," or "One-Time Suppliers" to streamline master data management and ensure consistent processing. These groupings are assigned during business partner creation and influence fields, screens, and functionalities available for each partner type.

Path: SPRO-> IMG-> Cross-Application Components-> SAP Business Partner-> Business Partner-> Basic Settings-> Number Ranges and Groupings-> Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges.

Step 2: Define Vendor Account Group

In SAP S/4 HANA, a Vendor Account Group is a key configuration element that categorizes vendors based on their roles and business requirements. It determines the control parameters for vendor master data, such as number ranges, field settings, and screen layouts.

Account groups ensure that vendors are managed consistently and efficiently, whether they are one-time suppliers, regular vendors, or international partners. By defining specific account groups, organizations can tailor vendor master records to meet their unique operational needs, ensuring smoother procurement processes and better data governance. Proper configuration of vendor account groups is essential for optimizing vendor management in SAP S/4 HANA.

Path: SPRO->IMG-> Financial Accounting->Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable-> Supplier Accounts-> Master Data-> Preparations for Creating Supplier Master Data-> Define Account Groups with Screen Layout (Vendors).

For example, Business requires reconciliation account as mandatory for Import Vendor.

 Select Z001 and navigate to details, then Double click on Company Code Data

Double click on Account Management

Make reconciliation account is required entry for Import Vendor

Step 3: Assign number ranges to vendor account groups

Path: SPRO->IMG-> Financial Accounting->Accounts Receivable and Accounts  Payable-> Supplier Accounts-> Master Data-> Preparations for Creating  Supplier Master Data-> Assign Number Ranges to Vendor Account Groups.

Step 4: Business Partner & Vendor Account Mapping

Path: SPRO-> IMG-> Cross-Application Components-> Master Data Synchronization-> Customer/Vendor Integration-> Business Partner Settings-> Settings for  Vendor Integration-> Field Assignment for Vendor Integration-> Assign Keys-> Define Number Assignment for Direction BP to Vendor.

Click on New Entries, enter the grouping and account groups and tick on same Nos. as shown.

Step 5: Create Sample Import Vendor

Chose Z001 -Import vendor and enter all required data and select the BP role as per requirement

Click on Purchasing

Enter the required data in purchasing screen

Select Company code and enter the required data.

Vendor 11012 Created.

Step 6: Business Partner Role Configuration

In SAP S/4 HANA, Business Partner roles define the functions or relationships a business partner can have within the system, such as customer, vendor, or employee. Configuring these roles is essential to ensure accurate and efficient master data management. Each role determines the attributes, data views, and processes associated with the business partner. Assign the relevant attributes and partner functions to each role, ensuring alignment with your business processes.

BP Role

Title

Description

FLVN00

FI Vendor

Business Partner Vendor

FLVN01

Purchase Vendor

Business Partner Supplier

BP Role Grouping

SPRO->IMG-> Cross-Application Components-> SAP Business Partner-> Business Partner-> Basic Settings-> Business Partner Roles-> Define BP Role

Click New Entries and enter Role Grouping Name, navigate to BP Role Groupings -> BP Roles.

Click on New Entries

Assign the BP Roles as per the requirement and then save the data

Step 7: Let's Create a Vendor sing BP Role Grouping

Navigate to Transaction BP, Select the created BP Role.

All the required views like Company code, Purchasing and General Data will appear in a single screen.

Enter the Company Code details

Enter the Purchasing Data Details and save the BP

BP 11014 Created.

entry.title: Delivery Relevant Sales Items with Billing Plan
entry.content:
I am looking for a solution to this:

Customer orders x 10 of an item at £150.00 each.

No set delivery date. Customer will advise as and when they are to be delivered this year (when needed). They will be dispatched via standard delivery processes.

But billing will not be delivery related. Customer will be billed as per scheduled billing plan of £125 last day of each month.

How can I apply a billing plan to delivery relevant sales line?

entry.title: Re: Stay certified without learning hub
entry.content:
Support confirmed that a learning hub subscription is necessary in order to stay certified. This seems very odd since a subscription is far more expensive than a single certification exam.

If I remeber correctly SAP said by than that a certification will not lose it's validity. This does not seem the case anymore...

entry.content: We are using replication flows to store the data in a local table...why?

Hi all,

 

How to configure, and how to select the onboardee, the check box with adobe live cycle?

 

Thanks

Kr

 

@Gopinath

entry.title: Re: Reset clear items from previous FIscal year
entry.content:
This message could be converted to a warning one or even deactivated

  • Check 395526 - FBRA: no warning message when clearing previous years
  • SM30 on T100S or thru SPRO

entry.title: Re: Detailed steps to establish integration between Azure blob Storage & BTP CPI
entry.content: Do we need to configure cloud connector for connecting AzureStorage or its not required.

entry.title: Re: SSO Certificate Renewal process for SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi

The correct decision would be to migrate to IAS. There's a whole community about this migration. You can start here to understand the process

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/568fdf1f14f14fd089a3cd15194d19cc/53aad36ddbf242dd8e9e6d09804c11e0.html

the main community is here and they schedule calls parodically to answer questions about this migration to customers and partners. not sure if they still have calls at this point.

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/migration-to-sap-cloud-identity-authentication-ias-ips-innovation-alert-amp/ba-p/271407

The migration is not complex but you need to evaluate some things depending on the customer landscape. i.e how many instances do you have and how many IAS tenants you need. How will you manage PWD based access for non-SSO users if you have such scenario, etc. 

IAS in your scenario probably will be used just as a proxy if you want to maintain your IDP. This means that when a user logs to SF will be redirected to IAS first but IAS will then authenticate the user with your IDP. The SSO Users should not see any impact, there are still authenticating with your IDP but behind the scenes you use IAS as a proxy

Hope it Helps

Diego

entry.title: Re: Dynamic restricted key figure in analytic model
entry.content:
Thanks

I tried to add to mi time dimension calculated columns like LastMonth etc. abut when I tried to build a restricted measure over then time dimension with a filter like MONTH = LastMonth (both columns from the same time dimesion) it I got a message saying "Right side operand LastMonth must not be a dimension
And when I tried to build something like Month(BillDate()) = LastMonth I got a message "functions must be used in the restricted measure expression"

entry.title: Re: Backorder Processing in aATP - SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi @nipunr ,

Thanks for the detailed explanation on strategies with an example.
We have a client requirement for BOP where in BOP run should follow a first-come, first served approach, where orders that fall into Back orders should be confirmed based on their creation sequence. Selection criteria is Material and plants combination. Additionally, any already confirmed orders (Partially or fully) should not lose their confirmations- they should either retain their existing confirmation or gain additional stock if available?
Given these conditions, which BOP strategy in aATP would best fulfill requirement?

We will open it in SE06 and delete it manually. I tried to do exaclty your described steps. After several retries I stopped it. Have you had similar problems?

Regards,

Peter

entry.title: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi Guys,SAP HANA cloud

Need your expertise in handling the variables in SQL based view. I want to read the values of specific record's fields from the prior record into variables and then want to search a record based on those variables.

Tried using below script but not assigning any values into LINK_LEVEL, FATH_COMP, FATH_GPC, SON_COMP, SON_GPC.

 

DECLARE LV_REC_COUNT INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_INDEX INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_NEST_INDEX INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_INDEX_TEST INTEGER;

DECLARE LV_FATH_COMP NVARCHAR(8);
DECLARE LV_SON_COMP NVARCHAR(8);
DECLARE LV_FATH_GPC NVARCHAR(18);
DECLARE LV_SON_GPC NVARCHAR(18);

-- DECLARE LT_TEMP TABLE ( CONS_SET VARCHAR(2), SU_BUNIT VARCHAR(2) );

LT_COST_03_DATA = SELECT * FROM "APMR_ST_COST_03";
SELECT COUNT(*) INTO LV_REC_COUNT FROM :LT_COST_03_DATA;

LT_COST_INDEX = SELECT *, ' ' AS LINK_LEVEL, ' ' AS FATH_COMP, ' ' AS FATH_GPC, ' ' AS SON_COMP, ' ' AS SON_GPC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TOLL_FLAG ORDER BY FRS_CODE, CALMONTH, NFRD_GPNO ) AS ROWNUM FROM :LT_COST_03_DATA;

LT_COST_LINK_FINAL = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE 1 = 100;

LV_INDEX = 1;
LV_NEST_INDEX = 1;

WHILE (LV_INDEX <= 2 )
DO
LV_INDEX = LV_INDEX + 1;
LT_INDEX_RECORD = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
IF RECORD_COUNT(:LT_INDEX_RECORD) <> 0 THEN
WHILE (LV_NEST_INDEX <= 20) DO
IF LV_NEST_INDEX = 1 THEN
SELECT "FRS_CODE" INTO LV_FATH_COMP FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "FRS_FPUR" INTO LV_SON_COMP FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
LT_COST_LINK_FINAL =
SELECT * FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD
UNION
SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;
ELSE
LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE
"FRS_CODE" = LV_SON_COMP AND
"NFRD_GPNO" = LV_SON_GPC;
IF RECORD_COUNT(:LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD) <> 0 THEN
SELECT "FRS_CODE" INTO LV_FATH_COMP FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD WHERE "FRS_CODE" = LV_SON_COMP AND
"NFRD_GPNO" = LV_SON_GPC;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT "FRS_FPUR" INTO LV_SON_COMP FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;

SELECT REPLACE( "LINK_LEVEL", '' , LV_NEST_INDEX ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_COMP", '' , LV_FATH_COMP ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_GPC", '' , LV_FATH_GPC ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "SON_COMP", '' , LV_SON_COMP ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_GPC", '' , LV_FATH_GPC ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;

LT_COST_LINK_FINAL =
SELECT * FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD
UNION
SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;
END IF;
END IF;
LV_NEST_INDEX = LV_NEST_INDEX + 1;
END WHILE;
LV_NEST_INDEX = 1;
ELSE
END IF;
END WHILE;

RETURN :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;

-----------------------------

Can some one let me know how to get the values of specific fields of specific record into variables or so.

Appreciate your help, thanks.

Regards,

Santosh T.

entry.title: Re: Unleash Your Inner ABAP Rockstar with Joule for developers , ABAP AI capabilities
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any chance to have this activated on the ABAP trial (TRL) instance?

Thanks,

Peter

entry.title: Re: Get log text messages from slg1 tcode
entry.content:
The meaning of message ID and message number (SY-MSGID, SY-MSGNO) can be looked up in transaction SE91. (Here "message ID" is called "message class". This can be a bit confusing, but it's just another word for the same thing...)

For example, if you specify Message Class = D0 and Message Number = 004, SE91 will tell you that the error text is:
"&: Act. table parameter & is empty"

You then replace the placeholders "&" with the values of SY-MSGV1 and SY-MSGV2. For example with MSGV1 = "Warning" and MSGV2 = "ORDER_HEADER_IN" we would get the final error message as
"Warning: Act. table parameter ORDER_HEADER_IN is empty"

Function module MESSAGE_PREPARE can be used to format a message text (=fill all the placeholders). As input it takes the language, message ID, No, V1-V4 and as output it returns the final error message.

entry.title: Re: BAPI or function module to delete technical objects f...
entry.content:
Did you already check BAPI_CUSTOMERCONTRACT_CHANGE options available for your version

  • Check also KBA 3323446 - Sales - SD BAPIs - Standard behaviors guide and How-to scenario 
  • But be aware of restriction on SD BAPI such as 1795864 - Serial number in sales order processing using BAPIs and usage of FM such as SERNR_AD_TO_AU 109533

entry.title: Re: Unleash Your Inner ABAP Rockstar with Joule for developers , ABAP AI capabilities
entry.content: @Peter_Inotai - no, J4D is available at no extra cost only for paying customers

entry.title: Re: How SAP B1 specifically in picking module create information from "bin location allocation
entry.content:
Hello,

Check the table OIBQ - Item Bin Accumulator Table. 

SELECT  OIBQ."BinAbs" AS "BinAbsEntry", OIBQ."OnHandQty" AS "Quantity"

FROM OIBQ

INNER JOIN OBIN ON OBIN."AbsEntry" = OIBQ."BinAbs"

WHERE OIBQ."ItemCode" = '99999'

AND OIBQ."WhsCode" = '01'

AND OIBQ."OnHandQty" > 0

Best regards

entry.title: Help with Adding Target Value to Sales Dashboard Query
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m working on creating a dashboard where I can filter sales data by month and display the total sales amount. So far, I’ve successfully achieved this. However, I’ve encountered an issue when trying to add a target value so that the dashboard not only shows the filtered sales but also displays a target value in a separate column next to it.

I haven’t been able to figure out how to implement this functionality. Below is the SQL query I have so far. Can anyone help me figure out how to modify it to include the target value in a new column?

SELECT
"CardCode" as "Customer Code",
"CardCode",
"CardName" AS "Customer Name",
"DocDate" as "Posting Date",
U."USER_CODE" AS "User Code",
"Total" as "Total Sales Amount",
"Total" as "Total Sales Amount"
FROM
(
(SELECT
T0."CardCode",
T0."CardName",
T0."DocDate",
T0."DocTotal" + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(t4."Gross") FROM inv9 t4 WHERE T0."DocEntry" = t4."DocEntry"), 0) AS "Total",
CASE
WHEN E1."userId" IS NULL THEN T0."UserSign"
ELSE E1."userId"
END AS "UserId"
FROM
oinv T0
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT
"empID",
"userId",
"salesPrson"
FROM
OHEM
WHERE
"userId" IS NOT NULL AND "salesPrson" IS NOT NULL
) E1 ON T0."SlpCode" = E1."salesPrson"
WHERE
T0."CANCELED" = 'N'
)
UNION ALL
(SELECT
T1."CardCode",
T1."CardName",
T1."DocDate",
(-1) * (T1."DocTotal" + IFNULL((SELECT SUM(t5."Gross") FROM rin9 t5 WHERE T1."DocEntry" = t5."DocEntry"), 0)) AS "Total",
CASE
WHEN E1."userId" IS NULL THEN T1."UserSign"
ELSE E1."userId"
END AS "UserId"
FROM
orin T1
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT
"empID",
"userId",
"salesPrson"
FROM
OHEM
WHERE
"userId" IS NOT NULL AND "salesPrson" IS NOT NULL
) E1 ON T1."SlpCode" = E1."salesPrson"
WHERE
T1."CANCELED" = 'N'
)
UNION ALL
(SELECT
T2."CardCode",
T2."CardName",
T2."DocDate",
"DocTotal" AS "Total",
CASE
WHEN E1."userId" IS NULL THEN T2."UserSign"
ELSE E1."userId"
END AS "UserId"
FROM
OCSI T2
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT
"empID",
"userId",
"salesPrson"
FROM
OHEM
WHERE
"userId" IS NOT NULL AND "salesPrson" IS NOT NULL
) E1 ON T2."SlpCode" = E1."salesPrson"
WHERE
T2."CANCELED" = 'N'
)
UNION ALL
(SELECT
T3."CardCode",
T3."CardName",
T3."DocDate",
(-1) * "DocTotal" AS "Total",
CASE
WHEN E1."userId" IS NULL THEN T3."UserSign"
ELSE E1."userId"
END AS "UserId"
FROM
OCSV T3
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT
"empID",
"userId",
"salesPrson"
FROM
OHEM
WHERE
"userId" IS NOT NULL AND "salesPrson" IS NOT NULL
) E1 ON T3."SlpCode" = E1."salesPrson"
WHERE
T3."CANCELED" = 'N'
)
) T
INNER JOIN
OUSR U ON T."UserId" = U."USERID"

entry.title: Re: Billing Number and XBLNR Number is not Generated Same...
entry.content:
Should be the same if you applied steps of KBA 3444642 - Determination of reference number (XBLNR) and assignment number (ZUONR) in billing document 

  • Check for any own data transfer routine that would override SAP values, or even some customer development that would not respect state of art
  • Look for available notes for your version
  • Raise an incident/case to SAP if you don't find

entry.title: Navigating the Future of Disclosure Management with SAP
entry.content:
Navigating the Future of Disclosure Management with SAP - Continued Support for SAP Disclosure Management in the Private Cloud & On Premises and Positioning a Partner-First Strategy for the Public Cloud 

In today's fast-paced business environment, the accurate and timely disclosure of financial and regulatory information is critical. Companies require robust and reliable solutions to manage this complex process seamlessly. SAP continues to offer solutions to support these needs, particularly in an on-premise and private cloud setup.  

SAP’s solution SAP Disclosure Management streamlines the final stages of financial reporting by enabling the creation, management, collaboration, and publication of financial data, while integrating compliance-enabling XBRL tagging and secure access to SAP data sources like SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Warehouse, and SAP Sustainability Control Tower (more info here), as well as many other data sources such as SQL DB or spreadsheets. In this blog we provide an update on the current state of SAP Disclosure Management, reflecting the evolving strategies and offerings tailored to meet the diverse needs of businesses today. 

SAP Disclosure Management for On-Premise and Private Cloud Deployments 

SAP is committed to bring SAP Disclosure Management to the private cloud in the near-term as an exciting advancement in SAP’s cloud first strategy. 

For businesses that prefer on-premise solutions, SAP Disclosure Management continues to be a trusted choice. This comprehensive solution enables enterprises to streamline their financial disclosure processes, ensuring compliance and enhancing transparency. We are pleased to inform you that maintenance for SAP Disclosure Management support has been confirmed until at least the entirety of 2030. This commitment underscores our dedication to providing long-term, stable support for our customers utilizing on-premise solutions. 

The chosen support period aligns with SAP's broader policy for many of our products and extensions. Maintenance extensions are typically reviewed three years before the end date. Notably, SAP Disclosure Management has historically seen several extensions, reflecting our commitment to adapt to evolving customer needs and regulatory landscapes. Businesses can continue to rely on SAP Disclosure Management with confidence, knowing we have their long-term interests covered. 

Partner-First Strategy for Public Cloud Solutions 

As digital transformation accelerates, many businesses are adopting public-cloud-based solutions to harness greater flexibility, scalability, and innovation. Recognising this shift, SAP will embrace a partner-first strategy for the public cloud solutions in the disclosure management domain. This approach will foster a vibrant ecosystem where SAP partners can develop and deliver specialised disclosure management solutions tailored to the unique needs of various industries and regions. 

Customers looking for public cloud solutions can explore partner offerings available on the SAP Store. Here, you will find innovative and reliable partner solutions designed to integrate with your SAP environment, helping you to meet your disclosure management requirements effectively. 

Conclusion 

The landscape of financial disclosure is complex and ever-changing. However, with SAP and partner offerings, businesses can confidently manage their disclosure processes both now and in the future, whether you prefer an on-premise or private cloud environment -- or the agility of public cloud offerings through our partner ecosystem. 

For more information or to start your journey with SAP Disclosure Management, contact your account executive or visit the SAP Store. Let SAP and our trusted partners help you navigate the future of disclosure management with confidence. 

Disclaimer: Maintenance timelines and product availability are subject to change based on SAP's review and extension policies. SAP customers should always refer to the latest official SAP communications and the SAP Product Availability Matrix available at SAP for Me for the most current information.

entry.title: Re: SAP SIGNAVIO PROCESS INTELLIGENCE: Unkown IP adress a...
entry.content:
Hello @mrankov ,

Thanks for posting this question! My name is Ascha and I am part of the virtual Customer Success Team at SAP Signavio.

After aligning with our Support Team, we do recommend you to open a ticket via SAP for Me (Login via S-User ID and Password) as it seems like this is an individual issue. By creating a ticket, you'll be in direct contact with our experts who are eager to support you with your problem.

Thanks for your understand and kind regards

Ascha (as part of the virtual Customer Success Team)

entry.title: Re: Print HU label at Product WT confirmation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Markas ,

could you please clarify the following:

Usually, multiple warehouse tasks are confirmed into the same picking handling unit. If printing shall take place at confirmation of the warehouse task, would you then expect that it is printed for every confirmation? So it would be more like a material label for each pick? Or should it only print at the last warehouse task? This would be impossible for the system to know if a warehouse task is the last warehouse task. Or is your use case simply, that there is always just one warehouse task?

Thank you for further clarifying the context.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: LINK TO WEBGUI IN TUTORIAL IS NOT WORKING ANYMORE?
entry.content:
A hyperlink is not an image so don't post a screenshot, post the URL.

Got it.

 

In this step you’ll find the EPM OData service by looking for it via the maintenance transaction for the Internet Communication Framework (ICF), to understand how web-based resources in general and OData services in particular are managed within an ABAP system.

Log on to the SAP Gateway Demo system via the Web GUI. If necessary, use the arrow button to make the OK Code field appear, so you can enter transaction codes.

You were already told one week ago that the Web GUI doesn't work, there's only an access via Fiori LaunchPad. Skip the section or contact SAP to make it fixed (feedback button).

entry.title: Re: Print HU label at Product WT confirmation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hey @Christian,

We only print 1 label per pick (WT).

We pack only 1 material per HU (carton). We will never add more than 1 material to this HU.

An example of how our HUs will look like,

HU 300000501, Material: TG11, Qty x 3

entry.title: Automate credential management for SDI Agent Admin and Agent XS Messaging User
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Can you please guide us around automation steps that can be used to update the Agent Admin HANA User and the Agent XS HANA User credentials?

Is there any SAP Standard API or command line utility or script available which can be used to update the credential store on the DPAgent host machine and/or update credentials for both these users?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automate credential management for SDI Agent Admin an...
entry.content:
Dear Team,

There is no built-in tool to fully automate these processes, but both the Configuration Agent and the Secure Storage Utility can be used in batch mode. You can find help for these utilities here:

  • Manage the Agent XS HANA User Credentials [Batch]
  • Connecting to SAP HANA [Batch]

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Which course should i take to clear the fiori developer certification?
Re: Supply Protection of advanced ATP in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @arindamsur 
no this is not correct.
Protection is the quantity you can define for a single time bucket of a protection group. Usually a request doesn't match with multiple supply protection objects (or Groups).
The important thing here is not the protection, but the restriction. If a request (e.g. a Sales Order) doesn't match a characteristic of the Supply Protection Object the request is restricted by all the remaining protection of SUP. Also later weeks are restricting the request. Only if a time bucket is in the past (end date is in the past), the protection will get ignored and will not restrict.

If a request matches a time bucket (with its characteristics and the matching date) it depends on the settings of SUP, how other time buckets are restricting the request. This is also described (and illustrated) in this Blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/supply-protection-in-a-nutshell/ba-p/13580060

Best regards,

Arno
